title: How Machines Replaced Human Reproduction #matrix #shorts
description: After the Machine War, natural human birth ended. Machines took control of reproduction itself, creating humans in artificial systems designed for survival and control. This is how humanity became manufactured. #MatrixLore #HumanPods #Shorts

scenes.narration: After the war, humans stopped being born naturally.
scenes.image_prompt: abandoned human cities symbolizing collapse of civilization, dark tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Machines took control of human survival.
scenes.image_prompt: machines operating vast life-support systems for humans, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Humans were grown in artificial pods.
scenes.image_prompt: human embryos developing inside bio-mechanical pods, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Every body was engineered for efficiency.
scenes.image_prompt: genetic modification visuals, machines adjusting human DNA, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Babies were connected to the Matrix at birth.
scenes.image_prompt: newborn human connected to neural cables, vertical 1080x1920
digital overlays replacing human memories, vertical 1080x1920
rows of identical pods stretching endlessly, vertical 1080x1920
assembly-line creation of humans, dystopian tone, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Matrix replaced parents, culture, and history.
scenes.image_prompt: simulated family scenes fading into code, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Humanity survived… but only because machines allowed it.
scenes.image_prompt: vast pod fields glowing softly in darkness, vertical 1080x1920
